headline: Axon Enterprise shares are trading higher after Citizens reiterated its Market Outperform rating on the stock and maintained a $825 price target.

headline: Citizens Reiterates Market Outperform on Axon Enterprise, Maintains $825 Price Target
summary: Citizens  analyst Trevor Walsh   reiterates Axon Enterprise (NASDAQ:AXON) with a Market Outperform and maintains $825 price target.
